entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: The crop species being studied for drought tolerance and stay-green traits

entities.name: STAY-GREEN
entities.description: A complex trait contributing to post-flowering drought-tolerance in sorghum

entities.name: DROUGHT TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of the plant to maintain productivity under drought stress

entities.name: DELAYED SENESCENCE
entities.description: The slowing of leaf aging, associated with the stay-green trait

entities.name: PERCENT GREEN LEAF AREA
entities.description: A quantitative measure used to evaluate the stay-green trait

entities.name: FINE-MAPPING
entities.description: A genetic technique used to narrow down the genomic region of a QTL

entities.name: INTROGRESSION LINE CROSS
entities.description: A breeding method used to develop a fine-mapping population

entities.name: GENOTYPING
entities.description: The process of determining the genetic constitution of an organism

entities.name: GBS
entities.description: Genotyping by sequencing, used for high-resolution mapping

entities.name: LINKAGE MAP
entities.description: A representation of the relative positions of markers on a chromosome

entities.name: BLUPS
entities.description: Best linear unpredicted means used for trait analysis

entities.name: QRT-PCR
entities.description: Quantitative real-time PCR used for gene expression validation

entities.name: SBI-10
entities.description: The 10th chromosome of sorghum, specifically the long arm (L)

entities.name: SSR
entities.description: Simple Sequence Repeats used for initial genotyping

entities.name: SNP
entities.description: Single Nucleotide Polymorphisms used for high-resolution linkage mapping

entities.name: QTL
entities.description: Quantitative trait loci governing complex traits
